VA CPRS synthetic note
55 yo male. Vitals: BP 132/82. On lisinopril.
Labs: TC 205 / LDL 132 / HDL 48 / TG 180 / ApoB 110 / Lp(a) 80 nmol/L / A1c 7.1.
Renal: eGFR 55; creatinine 1.15; UACR 45.
CT coronary calcium CAC 350.
Tobacco: never smoker. FHx: Father MI age 49. hsCRP 2.4. No prior MI, stroke, or PAD.
Diabetes = yes. Not on statin.
BMI 31
